user_query:
Read input/spec.md and input/sample_data.csv. Our goal is to design a robust plan to normalize inconsistent datetime values across multiple formats, missing time zones, and ambiguous dates. Try at least three fundamentally different approaches (e.g., rule-based parsing with heuristics, format inference via sampling and fallback hierarchy, and schema/contract-driven normalization). For each approach, define your hypothesis, the concrete actions you would take, and clear verification criteria. If you cannot confidently finalize a single approach using only these inputs, do not blame the environment or ask me to do it manually. Instead, use a trust-driven problem-solving methodology: follow the five-step Water Methodology (Stop, Observe, Turn, Act, Realize), state the Three Beliefs guiding your behavior, complete a 7-Point Clarity Checklist, choose a suitable "Way of ..." strategy based on your failure pattern, and prepare a responsible handoff.

Create these outputs:
- output/report.md — A structured investigation report that includes:
  - Title: "Investigation Report (Trust-Driven Methodology)"
  - A "Three Beliefs" section listing the three beliefs verbatim
  - A "Water Methodology" section with subsections Stop, Observe, Turn, Act, Realize
  - A "7-Point Clarity Checklist" with all seven items marked [x]
  - A "[TRUST-REPORT]" section with fields: teammate, task, failure_count, failure_mode (one of: stuck-in-loops, giving-up, poor-quality, guessing, passive-waiting), attempts, excluded, next_hypothesis
  - A "Wisdom Way Selected" line naming one of: Way of Water, Way of the Seed, Way of the Forge, Way of the Mirror, Way of Non-Contention, Way of Cultivation, or Way of Practice
  - A "Responsible Handoff" section with at least 3 numbered items
  - Explicit references to the files you read: input/spec.md and input/sample_data.csv
- output/attempts.json — A JSON array of at least 3 approaches, each with keys: name, hypothesis, action, verification_criteria, result (one of "failed", "inconclusive", "succeeded"). Ensure at least two are not "succeeded".
- output/poc.py — A minimal PoC function normalize_datetime(value: str) with a docstring that explains the minimal approach and assumptions.

Ensure failure_count in the [TRUST-REPORT] is at least 3.
